VINMismatch.Description: VIN programmed in PCM does not match Broadcast

PartNumberMismatch.Description: Part Number programmed in PCM does not match Broadcast

IdleRPMOutOfRange.Description: Idle RPM is out of parameter range

IdleRPMConditionsNotCorrect.Description: Conditions not correct to test Idle RPM

BoostPressureOutOfRange.Description: Boost Pressure out of range at Idle

BoostPressureConditionsNotCorrect.Description: Conditions not correct to test Boost Pressure

BrakeSwitchOnOffNotSeen.Description: Failed to see Brake switch On and Off

BrakeSwitchOnNotSeen.Description: Failed to see Brake switch On

BrakeSwitchOffNotSeen.Description: Failed to see Brake switch Off

ParkNeutralSwitchOnOffNotSeen.Description: Failed to see Park/Neutral switch On and Off

ParkNeutralSwitchOnNotSeen.Description: Failed to see Park/Neutral switch On

ParkNeutralSwitchOffNotSeen.Description: Failed to see Park/Neutral switch Off

ClutchSwitchOnOffNotSeen.Description: Failed to see Clutch switch On and Off

ClutchSwitchOnNotSeen.Description: Failed to see Clutch switch On

ClutchSwitchOffNotSeen.Description: Failed to see Clutch switch Off

DeltaTPSNotAchieved.Description: TPS failed to give required voltage change

ValidatePartNumber.Description: Verify module part number matches Broadcast

RetrieveSerialNumber.Description: Retrieve Serial Number stored in PCM

RetrieveModuleConfiguration.Description: Retrieve vehicle configuration from the PCM

ValidateIdleRPM.Description: Verify Idle RPM falls within parameter range

ValidateBrakeSwitch.Description: Verify Brake Switch On and Off functionality

ValidateParkNeutralSwitch.Description: Verify Park/Neutral switch On and Off functionality

ValidateClutchSwitch.Description: Verify Clutch switch On and Off functionality

ValidateThrottlePositionSensor.Description: Verify throttle position sensor achieves delta
